title: MrKirbs8x
body:
## Want 8x pack? Get 8x pack!
MrKirbs 8X sets on setting the already SNES Quality 16x textures of Minecraft to an even lower 8x and bringing a new yet familiar style to your hardcore experience.
This pack supports the latest update (V1.20), so you'll have a ball working with the newly compatible features!

MrKirbs 8X Minecraft Texture Pack
